title: ToolTreaux Assorted Abrasive Stone Burrs with Mandrels High Speed Sanding 100pc
description:
The ToolTreaux abrasive stone burrs set comes with 100 assorted sanding and grinding burrs that are designed to fit most standard dremel and rotary tools. These burrs are ideal for sanding and grinding a variety of materials including glass, ceramics, gemstones and more. Our 100 piece abrasive burr set includes 6 different common burr shapes for a variety of projects: 40 wheels, 20 cylinders, 10 rounded cylinders, 10 tapered cylinders, 10 bullets and 10 cones. All of the included burrs feature a 1/8“ shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools, making this a must-have set of dremel accessories

ToolTreaux Assorted Abrasive Stone Burrs with Mandrels High Speed Sanding 100pc

The ToolTreaux abrasive stone burrs set comes with 100 assorted sanding and grinding burrs that are designed to fit most standard dremel and rotary tools. These burrs are ideal for sanding and grinding a variety of materials including glass, ceramics, gemstones and more.

Key Features

  • BURRS FOR PRECISION ROTARY TOOLS - ToolTreaux abrasive stone burrs set comes with 100 assorted grinding and sanding burrs that will fit all standard precision rotary and dremel tools; ideal for high speed sanding and grinding of ceramics, glass, gems, stones and more
  • ASSORTED SHAPES - 100pc kit includes 6 different burr shapes: 40 wheels, 20 cylinders, 10 rounded cylinders, 10 tapered cylinders, 10 cones and 10 bullets for a variety of uses
  • 1/8 INCH SHANK - All of the included burrs feature a 1/8 inch mandrel shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools; Must-have sanding and grinding accessories for dremel owners
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Abrasive stone burrs are made of high-quality materials; pink and grey burrs are made from aluminum and green burrs are made from monoxide; ideal construction for grinding and sanding
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 100; Materials: aluminum, stone, monoxide; Compatibility: fits most standard rotary and dremel tools; Shank size: 1/8“; Foam storage case included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT100PCROTTS
  • UPC: 810058486813
  • Color: Pink and Grey
  • Size: Multi-Color

Our 100 piece abrasive burr set includes 6 different common burr shapes for a variety of projects: 40 wheels, 20 cylinders, 10 rounded cylinders, 10 tapered cylinders, 10 bullets and 10 cones. All of the included burrs feature a 1/8“ shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools, making this a must-have set of dremel accessories.

All of the abrasive stone burrs are made of high-quality materials: the green burrs are made from monoxide and the pink and grey burrs are made of aluminum, both of which are great for grinding and sanding the above mentioned materials. Make sure you have a set of abrasive stone burrs before your next rotary tool project!
